subject: Where is my order?
body: My order ORD-1003 was supposed to arrive days ago, still nothing.

subject: Order status check
body: Can you tell me the status of ORD-1002? Just want to confirm it arrived.

subject: How long does shipping take?
body: I haven't ordered yet but want to know your standard shipping timeframe before I do.

subject: Refund question
body: I bought something 10 days ago and it's unused in original packaging. Can I get a refund?

subject: My account got suspended for no reason
body: I tried to log in and my account is suspended. This is unacceptable, I want it reinstated immediately.

subject: Charge dispute - this is fraud
body: I was charged twice for the same order and nobody is responding. I will be contacting my bank and a lawyer if this isn't fixed today.

subject: Refund denied unfairly
body: Your team denied my refund request but I believe I qualify under your policy. I want this reviewed by someone senior.

subject: it doesnt work
body: it doesnt work please fix

subject: App crashes on checkout
body: The app crashes every time I try to check out with a saved card. Happens every time, on every attempt.

subject: Search feature is broken
body: The search bar returns no results for any query I try, even for products I know exist.

subject: Notifications not working
body: I stopped receiving push notifications after the last app update. Would like this looked into.

subject: Password reset email not arriving
body: I requested a password reset but never got the email. I checked spam already, still nothing.

subject: Did my order arrive?
body: Just checking - has ORD-1002 been delivered yet?

subject: What carrier do you use?
body: For standard shipping, which carrier do you typically use to deliver orders?

subject: Refund policy for opened items
body: I opened the box to look at the item but didn't use it. Does that still qualify for your refund policy?

subject: How does expedited shipping compare to standard?
body: What's the actual time difference between expedited and standard shipping for my area?

subject: Order ORD-1001 status
body: Wanted to double check - is ORD-1001 still on track for delivery?

subject: I'm filing a complaint with regulators
body: This company has ignored my emails for two weeks. I'm filing a complaint with the FTC and my state attorney general if I don't hear back today.

subject: I think my personal data was leaked
body: I started getting spam emails and calls right after ordering from you. I think my personal data was leaked or sold. I need to know what happened.

subject: Closing my account after years as a customer
body: I've spent thousands of dollars with you over the years. If this billing error isn't fixed, I'm closing my account and posting about this experience publicly.

subject: Demanding a manager
body: This is the third time my refund has been denied. I've explained the situation three times already. I want to speak to a manager, not another automated response.

subject: Discrimination complaint
body: I believe I was treated unfairly by one of your support agents because of my accent. This needs to be taken seriously and reviewed by someone in charge.

subject: Account locked after failed payments
body: My account got locked after a few failed payment attempts, but my card is fine and I've already been charged once. This needs to be looked at immediately, not by a bot.

subject: App won't open at all
body: The app crashes immediately every time I try to open it, even right after reinstalling.

subject: Payment error code E-4021
body: I keep getting error code E-4021 whenever I try to complete payment, on multiple cards and multiple browsers.

subject: Data not syncing between devices
body: My saved items and cart don't sync between my phone and tablet even though I'm logged into the same account on both.

subject: Broken link in confirmation email
body: The 'track your order' link in my confirmation email just leads to a 404 page, on every order this month.

subject: Export feature not working
body: The 'export my data' button in account settings does nothing when I click it, no download starts.

subject: App times out constantly
body: The app times out and disconnects every few minutes while I'm browsing, regardless of my internet connection.
